artifact.source:
root = Card([table], "Benchmark Results", "50 runs across scenarios, models, and arms", "full")
data = Query("read_csv", {path: "./data/results.csv"}, {rows: [], columns: []})
cols = [
  {key: "run_id", label: "Run ID"},
  {key: "scenario", label: "Scenario"},
  {key: "model", label: "Model"},
  {key: "arm", label: "Arm"},
  {key: "tokens_in", label: "Tokens In"},
  {key: "tokens_out", label: "Tokens Out"},
  {key: "latency_ms", label: "Latency (ms)"},
  {key: "passed", label: "Passed"}
]
caption = "Results"
table = DataTable(caption, cols, data.rows, true)

toolInput.title: Benchmark Results
